case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS CALIFORNIA COLLISION CENTER

docket_entries.description: OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-14-1992, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY DARRYL HOLLINS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA COLLISION CENTER $1,739.37 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,785.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
